claim_text: MRI has been used to measure cerebral blood flow (CBF) but is not yet validated for cerebral metabolic rate of oxygen (CMRO2), a measure of OXPHOS23 . pH imaging using CEST provides an indirect measure of lactate (Lac) and hence GLY24 . 1 H MRS of lactate can assess lactate pool sizes, indirectly related to GLY, however, contain no flux information and often suffer from magnetic field inhomogeneities and overlapping lipids25 .

sub_claims.text: MRI has been used to measure cerebral blood flow (CBF) but is not yet validated for cerebral metabolic rate of oxygen (CMRO2), a measure of OXPHOS23 . pH imaging using CEST provides an indirect measure of lactate (Lac) and hence GLY24 . 1 H MRS of lactate can assess lactate pool sizes, indirectly related to GLY, however, contain no flux information and often suffer from magnetic field inhomogeneities and overlapping lipids25 .
sub_claims.nuance: Source PDF not fetched during Phase 2 (paywalled or not reachable under personal-only access).
